body_txt: The knife is painless, but life hurts like a bitch. The opposite of Driven to Suicide . A character is just tired of life, wants to see what death is like, or knows they only have a short time to live anyway, or is just plain crazy. So, usually while sporting a huge smile, they kill themselves, often by jumping off of a building. Either played straight for creepy effect to establish how out of touch a character is with reality, or alternately used in Black Comedy for laughs. See also Nothing Left to Do but Die . Ironically, the Trope Namer , M*A*S*H (1970) , actually averts the trope by being featured in a scene in which the intent is to prevent a suicide. No Real Life Examples, Please!
